title: cyperorchis tracyana
intro: Cyperorchis tracyana, also known as the Tracy's orchid or the East Himalayan orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cyperorchis tracyana include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a powder or infused in water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
